user.title: Gizwits Cloud account
user.description: Enter your Syna-G+ Cloud account credentials to discover Maxspect devices.

pick_device.title: Select device
pick_device.description: Select the Maxspect device to add.

device_config.title: Device configuration
device_config.description: Enter the local network IP address, friendly name, and pump models for {mac}.

manual.title: Manual connection
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Maxspect device on the local network.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is on the same network.
error.cloud_auth_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your Syna-G+ Cloud credentials and region.
error.no_devices_found: No Maxspect devices found in your cloud account.

abort.not_maxspect_device: The discovered device is not a Maxspect device.
